programme.title: Jaan-E-Mann: Let's Fall in Love... Again
programme.desc: To avoid paying a hefty alimony, Suhaan (Salman Khan) thinks of getting his ex-wife Pia (Preity Zinta) remarried. For that, he convinces Pia¡¯s simpleton college friend Agastya Rao (Akshay Kumar) that he can still marry his college crush. He then helps Agastya to woo Pia, but ends up falling in love with her all over again.

programme.title: Mere Baap Pehle Aap
programme.desc: Gaurav takes great care of his widowed father Janardhan who has single-handedly raised him and his brother with love. Soon, when Gaurav falls in love, he finds out about his father¡¯s childhood love and insists that Janardhan gets married first.

programme.title: Maine Pyaar Kyun Kiya
programme.desc: Samir, a handsome orthopaedic surgeon, lies about being married, to keep the women falling for him at bay. However, when he meets and falls in love with Sonia, he is forced to conjure up a wife and fake a divorce, in order to marry her.

programme.title: Kandahar
programme.desc: Suryanath, an unemployed pilot, gets inspired by Major Mahadevan to join the Indian Army. Soon, while travelling to Kandahar with his team, their flight gets hijacked. Now Suryanath must rise to the occasion to save the hostages along with his team.

programme.title: EVERGREEN HITS

programme.title: HIT HAI TOH BAJEGA

programme.title: MASTIII DOUBLES
programme.desc: The theme of the show is to exhibits dual work of an artist. It could be an Actor, Actress, vocalist, lyricist, or composer. It’s a non-stop 120 minutes of a euphonious evening with 2 hits of each artist played back to back.

programme.title: JUST MOHABBAT
programme.desc: If you wish to cherish love at first sight, the butterfly moments, and the feeling when he or she said yes to for the first time, just snuggle up and tune in. We promise to refresh such moments every evening with us.

programme.title: THE GOLDEN ERA WITH ANNU KAPOOR
programme.desc: ‘The Golden Era with Anu Kapoor’ is a distinctive show, where Anu Kapoor walks you down to the memory lane of the golden and the classic era of Bollywood, he shares never heard trivia and offers you to revel the evening with Bollywood’s Golden and Classic songs.

programme.title: RAAT KE HUMSAFAR
programme.desc: If old classic music is the moonlight in the gloomy night of your life, then RAAT KE HUMSAFAR is the perfect show for you. The show focuses on bringing the best out of the best old melodious songs from the 1950s to the 1990s.

programme.title: Newbie and The Disasternauts
programme.desc: In the far future, 10 year-olds can buy experiences as easily as today's kids buy video games. Newbie decides to spend his money on a trip to outer space. Unfortunately, Newbie crashes his trip, and now he is lost in space!

programme.title: Jack
programme.desc: Jack is a small alien who finds everything on Earth fascinating. Spurred on by his insatiable need to learn about creatures and phenomena from Earth and outer space, Jack boldly yet recklessly guides his alien friends through some tricky adventures. While on Earth, he makes some new friends, Niko, Yoki and Sam, who go to great lengths to keep Jack and his various schemes a secret. Along the way, they also begin to realize just how fascinating Earth and outer space can be! The animated series Jack is aimed at 6 to 11 year olds. It combines humor, adventure and science to help children learn a range of topics by following the exciting adventures of their extra-terrestrial hero.

programme.title: Megastructures: Beijing Water Cube
programme.desc: China has erected some of the greatest monuments on Earth.

programme.desc: Take some of the best design brains in the business. The Shanghai World Financial Center is what you get.

programme.title: Megastructures: Chinas' Smart Tower
programme.desc: The Pearl River Tower is the holy grail for mechanical engineers, and even generates its own power.

programme.title: Megastructures: Singapore's Vegas
programme.desc: Singapore's Marina Bay Sands is one of the world's most complicated construction projects.

programme.title: Earth in 1000 Years
programme.desc: Scientists are looking back at past geological ages to understand the influence of ocean currents.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Oceania: The Tectonic Ring of Fire
programme.desc: Pacific and Australian tectonic plates clash across the South Pacific causing intense volcanic activity.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: The Tectonics of Life and Death
programme.desc: First Asia hurtled into Europe. They remain bound together by the Urals.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Asia: Rising Mountains and Sinking Countries
programme.desc: As the Indo-Asian collision continued into the rest of Asia, the deforming pressure created islands.

programme.title: Voyage of the Continents: Europe: Tropical Beginnings
programme.desc: One billion years ago there was just one great continent on earth. Then, it began to break apart.

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods.

programme.title: Toll Bar
programme.desc: Rauan works at a parking lot in a prestigious residential area. Aidar passes him daily in his luxurious car. The auto belongs to his father, who works in the oil business. Rauan and Aidar are both determined to build their own lives themselves. They live in the same city, their paths cross in the same yard, but there is an abyss between them. They are separated by a toll-bar between wealth and poverty. One day Aidar and Rauan will clash and their worlds will clash. What will the results be..?

programme.title: And Then There Were None
programme.desc: Seven guests, a newly hired personal secretary and two staff are gathered for a weekend on an isolated island by the hosts the Owens who are delayed. At dinner a record is played and the host's message alleges that all the people present are guilty of murder and suddenly the first of them is dead, then the next - It seems that one of them is the murderer but the leading person is always the person who is murdered next and at last only two people are left.

programme.title: Under Capricorn
programme.desc: In 1831, Irishman Charles Adare travels to Australia to start a new life with the help of his cousin who has just been appointed governor. When he arrives he meets powerful landowner and ex-convict Sam Flusky, who wants to do a business deal with him. Whilst attending a dinner party at Flusky's house, Charles meets Flusky's wife Henrietta who he had known as a child back in Ireland. Henrietta is an alcoholic and seems to be on the verge of madness.

programme.title: Late Spring
programme.desc: Noriko is twenty-seven years old and still living with her widowed father. Everybody tries to talk her into marrying, but Noriko wants to stay at home caring for her father.

programme.title: Song Of The Road
programme.desc: Sometime in the early years of the century, a boy, Apu, is born to a poor Brahmin family in a village in Bengal. The father, a poet and priest, cannot earn enough to keep his family going. Apu's sister, Durga, is forever stealing guavas from the neighbour's orchards. All these add to the daily struggles of the mother's life, notwithstanding her constant bickering with old aunt who lives with the family.

programme.title: Critically Acclaimed
programme.desc: This group showcases independent, award-winning stories of high quality with many having been selected at film festivals and contests. This collection includes family drama, emotional stories, romance, comedy, and more.

programme.title: Period/Historical
programme.desc: A collection of short films set in different times throughout history, from the battlefields of WW2 to the streets of 1950s Mississippi, these are dramas and action stories that focus on the power of individual choice and the strength of humanity.

programme.title: Best of Sofy
programme.desc: A selection of the most compelling, highest quality, emotionally impactful, and award-winning shorts on Sofy TV, includes a range of all genres from all over the world.

programme.title: Family Drama
programme.desc: Dramatic stories with broader and sometimes more accessible themes for everyone, this collection of shorts includes everything from family comedy, and animation to heavier hitting, gritty storytelling.

programme.title: Romantic Comedy
programme.desc: Taking the serious topic of love and bringing humour, these romantic comedies explore the pain and pressure of relationships with lightness, laughter, and (generally) happy endings.

programme.title: Best of Sofy

programme.title: Broad Comedy
programme.desc: Full of hilarious scenarios, characters, dialogue, and consequences, this selection of shorts has it all. A range of international films are included but the humor remains universal.

programme.title: Italian Corner
programme.desc: The best of Italy in shorts, including dystopian Sci-fi, drama, and thrillers with a modern edge.

programme.title: Travel Plan Berlin
programme.desc: Berlin's combo of glamour and grit is bound to mesmerise all those keen to explore its vibrant culture, cutting-edge architecture, fabulous food, intense parties and tangible history.

programme.title: Everyday Elements
programme.desc:
A series that puts chemistry in our everyday experience by showing the living connection we have with the chemicals and elements that make up our world.
The matter that built skies and seas, the atoms that make up you and me, the chemistry around us that forms the things we touch, smell and see. This series shows us what the objects in our universe and in our homes are made from and why the particles around us behave as they do. Everything around us is built from Everyday Elements.

programme.title: Everyday Elements
programme.desc:
A series that puts chemistry in our everyday experience by showing the living connection we have with the chemicals and elements that make up our world.
The matter that built skies and seas, the atoms that make up you and me, the chemistry around us that forms the things we touch, smell and see. This series shows us what the objects in our universe and in our homes are made from and why the particles around us behave as they do. Everything around us is built from Everyday Elements.

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc:
Series 8 of Distant Shores follows hosts, Paul and Sheryl Shard, on a voyage aboard their 49-foot sailboat, Distant Shores II, from the south coast of England to the Republic of Ireland where they sail to ports along the Irish Sea as they head north to Northern Ireland and Belfast where the ship Titanic was built. Next they sail to Scotland where they transit through the Crinan and Caledonian Canals, then explore the remote islands of Shetland, before crossing the notorious North Sea to the west coast of Norway. In Norway they explore the attractions in major towns as well as small fishing ports and sail down the world's longest fjord. They cross the North Sea once again to visit the Orkney Islands and Outer Hebrides of Scotland before making a passage south to the Brittany coast of France.
Paul and Sheryl set sail from Chichester Harbour in England and sail to Waterford on the southeast coast of the Republic of Ireland where they learn about the production of crystal before sailing to New Ross to visit the Dunbrody emmigrant ship and join a local boater for a trip down the Barrow River, one of Ireland's inland waterways.

programme.title: Travel Plan Bangkok
programme.desc: Bangkok, Thai Krung Thep, city, capital, and chief port of Thailand. It is the only cosmopolitan city in a country of small towns and villages and is Thailand’s cultural and commercial centre.

programme.title: Travel Plan Barcelona Part 1
programme.desc: Barcelona is a city on the coast of northeastern Spain. It is the capital and largest city of the autonomous community of Catalonia, as well as the second most populous municipality of Spain.

programme.title: Trajectory Project Mercury Begins
programme.desc:
Today, although a cloud of satellites surrounds the planet, many records set during the early decades of space exploration remain unsurpassed. It’s more than forty years since the last man walked on the moon and the world no longer has a reusable spacecraft. Trajectory looks at milestones in space exploration along with the latest scientific and commercial developments
1 PROJECT MERCURY ADVANCES America’s first manned space program finally puts a man in orbit 2 CAMERA TRACKING The array of special cameras that follow a spacecraft at launch 3 THE INTERNATIONAL SPACE STATION The building and operation of the orbiting laboratory

programme.title: Trajectory Project Mercury Advances
programme.desc:

programme.title: Distant Shores
programme.desc: At sea on a transatlantic passage on the ARC rally.

programme.title: WHAT IN THE WORLD
programme.desc: Timber is one of this country’s biggest natural resources and the source of great potential wealth. Hence the existence of wholesale illegal logging, irrespective of the consequences to the local environment. This has led concerned parties to set up the Olancho Environmental Movement. This organization has mobilized to protect these forests, at some risk to its members, like Rene Gradiz, whose testimony is disturbing in the extreme.

programme.title: SPACE MISTAKES
programme.desc: A spacecraft freefalls from orbit smashing into the ground when its parachute fails to deploy! Can the multi-million dollar science mission be salvaged? And, a wrong turn ruptures a costly Space Shuttle “cold plate!”

programme.title: Europe's Coastlines From Above
programme.desc: Bautiful coastal scenary is captured with aerial photography.

programme.title: ANGELO'S OUTDOOR KITCHEN
programme.desc: In this episode Wanaka based Chef Angelo Georgalli is on the South Island of New Zealand diving for fresh crayfish in the waters south of Jackson Bay. Using his rustic portable kitchen, he prepares oven baked crayfish sandwiches with chilli butter, a white bean and potato topped crayfish and asparagus pie and a slow roasted crayfish with fresh watermelon and mango salad.

programme.title: CAPTURE WILD SCHOOL
programme.desc: A student darter is selected to dart from the helicopter and soon a suitable giraffe is located. The dart location is perfect and the giraffe begins to slow down as the rest of the team jump into action. The giraffe becomes more of a challenge as it wrestles with the rope and breaks free. The drugs eventually take full effect and the giraffe is subdued. The team carry out all the checkups, take samples and reverse the drug in good time to see it run off in good health. The vet lecturers give the debrief and conclude with all the positives and negatives.

programme.title: BIG 5 CHALLENGE
programme.desc: Todayâ€™s mission is to track and locate a bull elephant with tusks longer than 50 cm, get within 50 meters on foot and stay in that range for 10 minutes to qualify. The best elephant picture of the day will be judged by wildlife photographer, Kimi Stewart. Team terminatorâ€™s approach on a huge bull elephant suddenly takes a different turn as the wind direction changes. Adrenaline begins to flow as the elephant mock charges and breaks a tree to show his strength. Team Invincibles hold their ground as an elephant draws closer to investigate their presence. A long standoff takes place as the huge beast towers over Mun (Indian contestant). The silence is broken as the elephant chooses to mock charge before crashing through the bush. Team Devil and Prada deal with their own drama as their elephant encounter gets too close for comfort. Kimi Stewart, the photographic judge chooses the best photograph of the day and the presenter, Sami Sabiti declares the leader of the day at the leader board session.
